overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a debris-filled industrial urban lot, entering a large warehouse with an abandoned party setup, and exploring the interior with dead bodies scattered on the ground. The scene transitions from an overcast outdoor environment to a dimly lit indoor space with purple stage lighting and graffiti-covered metal walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial parking lot with shipping containers and abandoned vans

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the debris-strewn industrial lot toward the warehouse entrance

entered.detail: damaged delivery van with blue stripes parked on the left side
light-colored van with front damage positioned in the center of the lot
large blue metal shipping container blocking the middle background
large metal warehouse structure with roll-up door on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an open industrial parking lot littered with trash and debris. A silver delivery van is parked on the left while a beige van sits in the center, and a blue shipping container blocks the path ahead. The large industrial warehouse destination is visible on the right under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse entrance with large roll-up door

events.description: entering the industrial warehouse from the outdoor parking lot
ambient light shifts from natural overcast to dim interior with colored stage lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the large open roll-up door into the warehouse interior

entered.detail: large open metal roll-up door serving as the warehouse entrance
metal wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and spray paint
overhead truss system with purple and blue stage lights illuminating the interior

segments.scene_description: The player enters the warehouse through a large roll-up door, transitioning from the bright overcast exterior to a dimly lit interior. Purple stage lights become visible in the distance, and graffiti-covered metal walls line the right side as the camera moves deeper into the industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned warehouse party space with stage setup

events.description: passing multiple dead bodies scattered on the warehouse floor

agents.ego_description: moving through the warehouse interior examining the abandoned party setup and debris

notable_agents.action: dead civilian lying face down on the concrete floor amidst scattered trash

entered.detail: green painted steel support columns with concrete bases
large black speaker cabinets and audio equipment near the stage
metal barrels and drums stacked against the right wall
stacked wooden shipping pallets near the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the warehouse, the player explores a large open space with a stage setup featuring purple and blue lighting. Dead bodies lie scattered across the debris-strewn concrete floor. Metal support pillars line the path, speaker stacks sit to the left, and graffiti covers the distant walls while the camera moves toward the far end of the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse far end with beverage tables and exit to city street

events.description: player approaches and interacts with a bottle on the table, UI popup displays item information
approaching the warehouse exit with view of urban street and buildings outside

agents.ego_description: examining items on a table and moving toward the warehouse exit overlooking the city street

notable_agents.action: dead body with visible tattoos lying near the exit doorway

entered.detail: table covered with white cloth holding multiple bottles of alcohol
large open doorway leading out to the urban street
tall modern buildings and city infrastructure visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the far end of the warehouse where a table with bottles and beverages sits against the graffiti-covered wall. After briefly interacting with a bottle, the camera continues toward the large exit doorway, revealing a view of the city street and tall buildings outside while passing more bodies on the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bleak, debris-strewn industrial lot into the dimly lit interior of a warehouse before emerging back into the city. It begins by navigating an open parking lot littered with trash and vans under an overcast sky, moving past a blue shipping container toward a large industrial building. As the camera passes through a roll-up door, the bright exterior light fades into a dark interior where purple stage lighting and graffiti-covered metal walls begin to define the space. The scene then expands into a large open hall filled with speaker stacks and dead bodies scattered across the concrete floor, moving deeper toward a stage setup. Finally, the camera passes a table of bottles against a far wall and continues toward a large exit doorway, revealing a view of tall city buildings in the distance.
